title: Nadav Tabak Live Organic Trance
description: Experience the electrifying world of Nadav Tabak, the guitarist and composer who first made waves with Opal Ocean and now unleashes a solo show bursting with energy, emotion and pure musical wizardry. Armed with an array of instruments, a looping pedal and fearless creativity, Nadav blends acoustic organic trance, tribal rhythms, exotic melodies and fiery Spanish-rumba techniques into a genre-bending sonic journey. Every performance is improvised, immersive and intensely personal, a hypnotic soundscape that evolves in real time. He has captivated crowds at festivals worldwide and shared stages with icons like Manu Chao, Hilight Tribe and many more Get ready for a performance that’s explosive, intimate and unlike anything you’ve heard.
